text:
After the nothingburger that was the preview, I didn't know what to expect from "Hotel Mario Bloopers 2". I'm glad that I had no expectations. This video had me dying from laughter from yesterday, especially during the rickroll part! My mom asked me why I stopped playing the song. She didn't know that I was watching a YouTube Poop. 🤣

(December 4, 2025 - 12:15 A.M.)

text:
Ok, I’ve been looking for this YTP for a while now. It was a YTP that had something like “Gay Bowser" in the title and I remember the upload date was most likely before 2010, and it didn’t have that many fews back in the day. 
 ———————————————————————————
As for the video itself, all I can remember is that it was a Hotel Mario youtube poop, it had the song "Barbie Girl" in it, they called Bowser gay a few times, and that at one point there was a sign that said "CONDOMS" somewhere in the video. I looked everywhere and I found a few old school Hotel Mario YTP’s from the 2000’s that didn’t match up to what I remember seeing. Does anyone who was active in the 2000’s remember what I just described?
author: @alex_harnar_618

text: Hotel Mario is Not An ANIME!!! I'm Kidding Of Course it is, Since Anime is short for Animation, so every animation is an anime, "technically" but then again the animations that don't go by the name anime very often are probably considered the worst animes in japan for unobvious reasons(the reason is because they don't do what they do in japan, and probably also because the character quality and art is "ugly"/Deformed and not that human looking like in fairly odd parents with the characters with funny shaped heads (square heads, circle heads, etc, and even sponge bob maybe even though their not human.)... well that's my shitty opinion about that anyways)

text: Out of many poops I have encountered in the late 2000s, none ever so comedic, creative, and amazingly timeless than the sequel to Hotel Mario bloopers. Its memorable, enjoyable, and it most definetley lives up to its standards as a funny, sureal, classic Youtube Poop.

text: How do you get a pic on your profile???
author: @jacklee3942

text: You just need to click on the account picture in your new tab page, which will bring up a small window with options to sign out or add acounts. there is also your account picture with a small banner under it that says "change photo" click it. it will bring up the options to change your pic. btw, next time you run into a question like this, its much easier to search it online.
author: @sithnchips

text: Clara Montgomery  well, it really depends on the browser you use. this answer speaks in terms of the google chrome browser. if you use another browser like internet explorer, you click on your youtube account instead and select "profile". it will bring up your google+ account. click on your account pic and you can edit it from there.
author: @sithnchips

2:52 and so ends the tale of the Super Mario Bros: Mario becomes lost in the mines of the Koopalings and is never seen again, and Luigi spontaneously combusts due to the black sorcery of Bowser. On that happy note, here's more bloopers!!
